measured_via: playwright-cli, browser-rendered DOM getBoundingClientRect (in CSS px)

nodes.comment: innerDiv width (126.10) is SMALLER than fO width (129.42). Because the cell is left-anchored in fO, text appears 1.66 px LEFT of the rect center.

innerDiv width (74.23) EXCEEDS fO width (69.73). Cell is left-anchored, so overflow occurs to the RIGHT only. Text appears 2.25 px RIGHT of the rect center; right overflow of 4.49 px is now visible thanks to overflow:visible.
